content:
Access resource data via a web API with powerful query support .
          
          Further information in the main CKAN Data API and DataStore documentation .
The Data API can be accessed via the following actions of the CKAN action API.
https://open.canada.ca/data/en/api/3/action/datastore_create
https://open.canada.ca/data/en/api/3/action/datastore_upsert
https://open.canada.ca/data/en/api/3/action/datastore_search
https://open.canada.ca/data/en/api/3/action/datastore_search?resource_id=e1ffee62-58cb-4e3e-b359-115c658388ad&limit=5
https://open.canada.ca/data/en/api/3/action/datastore_search?resource_id=e1ffee62-58cb-4e3e-b359-115c658388ad&q=jones
A simple ajax (JSONP) request to the data API using jQuery.
